economic_notes: GBEs include Hatchet Lake Denesuline First Nation Economic Development Corporation (100%), Hatchet Lake Development Limited Partnership (99.99%), Waterfound Development Limited Partnership (33.33%), and Waterfound Development Corp (33.33%). HLDLP operates retail enterprises with retail revenue of $15,702,719. Nation is member of PAGC, ADCFS, AERC, ADEA, ADNLC, and Ya'thi Nene.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Four GBEs accounted for under modified equity method including HLDLP which operates retail stores with ~$15.7M retail revenue. Restricted cash includes $8,839,763 for capital projects and $963,822 for CMHC reserves. Deferred revenue of $18.59M is large relative to total revenue reflecting capital project funding held. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + PAGC + FNT + FSIN + ADEA + Government of Saskatchewan + NLCDC + NSRD = $30,115,587. Annual debt service includes long-term debt repayment $280,082 + CMHC mortgages repayment $485,397 + loans payable repayment $427,225 = $1,192,704. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text.
